The fix as specified is INCOMPLETE — the underlying bug surfaces at the chain-helper / op-kernel interaction level beyond the bcast init() short-init swap. Possible root causes: (a) clash-chain still emits inits per-tile or (b) reset_chain semantics need updating, or (c) additional BIG-init call paths remain elsewhere in helper, or (d) state_configure bookkeeping removal causes downstream reconfig folds to mis-elide.
